       927          players.delete(userId);
       928        }
       929
       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +
       999        // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      1000        // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

⏺ Phase 9 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big celebratory modal pops on portal when a round ends:
  ┌──────────────────────────┐
  │         VICTORY          │   ← green / red / amber / grey by reason
  │                          │
  │        Winner            │
  │      ● a1b2c3d4          │
  │        ⭐ 5 / 5          │
  │                          │
  │   Click anywhere to dismiss
  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

  Test

  1. Open portal
  2. Join VR
  3. Place ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ + 🤖, start a short round
  4. Collect all goals → banner pops: "VICTORY / ● you / ⭐ 3/3"
  5. Or let time expire / die in fire → different titles + colors

  All six phases are now in game-idea branch + live at https://ar-app-jade.vercel.app/portal.html after next vercel --prod. Want me to deploy?

⏺ Clean. Commit + push Phase 5:

⏺ Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
      Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition…)
  ⎿  [game-idea 561e03b] Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition
      3 files changed, 169 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

⏺ Phase 5 shipped. Game now has juice.

  What's new

  - Synthesized audio (Web Audio API — no files needed):
    - 🗡️ 🔫 pickup → quick upward chirp + haptic
    - ⭐ pickup → two-note ding
    - ❤️  powerup → warm sweep
    - Sword hit → low square thud + strong rumble
    - Enemy kill → saw buzz + big rumble
    - Gun fire → sharp click + soft rumble
    - Taking damage → saw growl + rumble
    - Round start → two-note beep
    - Round win → C–E–G victory triad
    - Round lose → descending saw dirge
    - Round timeout → single muted beep
  - Controller haptics per cue (intensity + duration tuned per action)
  - Win condition — collect all ⭐💎🎯 placed at round start → round ends with completed + victory jingle. If zero goals were placed, it's treated as survival mode
   and the clock runs normally.
  - Hurt cue throttled to every 5 HP lost so standing in fire doesn't spam.

  Test

  1. Reload VR scene
  2. Place 🗡️  🔫 ⭐ ⭐ 🤖 🔥 on portal → Start Round (30s)
  3. Grab the sword (haptic pulse + chirp)
  4. Kill the robot (thud + kill-thump, score +2)
  5. Collect both stars (ding + ding + victory fanfare since goals=0)
  6. Or walk into fire until health hits 0 → lose dirge
  7. Or let the clock run out → muted timeout beep

  Known limits

  - First sound may be silent until the user gestures (browser autoplay rule) — Start Round button on portal counts as a gesture for the portal, but VR scene might
   need one click to unlock audio. In practice Meta Quest Browser is permissive.
  - No round-result panel yet (HUD just goes idle at round end)

  Phase 6 options

  - Result panel — big "YOU WIN! 7 points" / "TIME'S UP" overlay after round end, auto-hide in 4s
  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows leaderboard
  - Enemy variants — 👻 phases through, 💀 sprints, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — drag to reposition live, bulk-clear, round presets

  Which?

✻ Sautéed for 3m 55s

      116 +    // Show when a result lands, hide when cleared. Signal subscription
      117 +    // fires immediately with current value — we guard the null case so
      118 +    // we don't flash an empty panel on first frame.

      120 +      result.subscribe((r) => {
      121 +        if (r) {

      133      // the panel. Anything faster wastes draw calls.

      209 +    const W = RESULT_CANVAS_W, H = RESULT_CANVAS_H;
      210 +    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      211 +
      212 +    const accent = RESULT_COLORS[r.reason] ?? "#71717a";
      213 +
      214 +    // Backdrop
      215 +    ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(12,12,16,0.88)";
      216 +    roundedRect(ctx, 0, 0, W, H, 40);
      217 +    ctx.fill();
      218 +
      219 +    // Accent border
      220 +    ctx.strokeStyle = accent;
      221 +    ctx.lineWidth = 8;
      222 +    roundedRect(ctx, 6, 6, W - 12, H - 12, 34);
      223 +    ctx.stroke();
      224 +
      225 +    // Title
      226 +    ctx.fillStyle = accent;
      227 +    ctx.font = 'bold 136px system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif';
      228 +    ctx.textAlign = "center";
      229 +    ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
      230 +    ctx.fillText(RESULT_TITLES[r.reason] ?? "ROUND OVER", W / 2, 140);
      231 +
      232 +    // Score
      233 +    ctx.fillStyle = "#fbbf24";
      234 +    ctx.font = 'bold 72px "Apple Color Emoji", system-ui, sans-serif';
      235 +    ctx.fillText("⭐", W / 2 - 110, 290);
      236 +    ctx.fillStyle = "#f4f4f5";
      237 +    ctx.font = 'bold 92px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace';
      238 +    ctx.textAlign = "left";
      239 +    ctx.fillText(String(r.score), W / 2 - 50, 293);
      240 +
      241 +    this.resultTexture.needsUpdate = true;
      242 +  }
      243  }
      244
      245 +const RESULT_TITLES: Record<RoundEndReason, string> = {
      246 +  completed: "VICTORY",
      247 +  died: "YOU DIED",
      248 +  timeout: "TIME'S UP",
      249 +  "host-stopped": "ROUND ENDED",
      250 +};
      251 +
      252 +const RESULT_COLORS: Record<RoundEndReason, string> = {
      253 +  completed: "#10b981",
      254 +  died: "#ef4444",
      255 +  timeout: "#f59e0b",
      256 +  "host-stopped": "#a1a1aa",
      257 +};

⏺ Phase 6 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big result overlay appears when the round ends, floating ~1.8m in front of the head:

  ┌─────────────────────┬─────────────┬───────┐
  │       Reason        │    Title    │ Color │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ All goals collected │ VICTORY     │ green │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Health hit 0        │ YOU DIED    │ red   │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Timer ran out       │ TIME'S UP   │ amber │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Host clicked End    │ ROUND ENDED │ grey  │
  └─────────────────────┴─────────────┴───────┘

  - Shows final ⭐ score prominently
  - Auto-dismisses after 4.5s
  - Reason-matched audio cue (already shipped in Phase 5) fires at the same time

  Test

  - Collect all ⭐ → green VICTORY + final score
  - Walk into 🔥 until dead → red YOU DIED
  - Let the clock expire → amber TIME'S UP
  - Portal hits End Round mid-play → grey ROUND ENDED

  Phase 7 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast page shows a live leaderboard during the round
  - Enemy variants — 👻 floats/phases, 💀 faster + weak, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — portal round presets (save/load grid layouts), live drag-to-move during round
  - Goal counter in HUD — show ⭐ 3 / 7 instead of just score so the player knows how many are left

  Which?

      54 +// Per-variant stats. Lookup keyed by the portal's `item.type` string so
      55 +// the portal can keep emoji picking simple and the game picks up flavor.
      56 +// Unknown types fall back to ENEMY_DEFAULT (backwards-compat with any
      57 +// older grid snapshots).
      58 +export type EnemyStats = {
      59 +  hp: number;
      60 +  speed: number;         // m/s
      61 +  dps: number;           // damage-per-second to player on touch
      62 +  killPoints: number;    // score award on defeat
      63 +  bobAmp: number;        // vertical bob amplitude (m) — 0 = grounded
      64 +  bobSpeed: number;      // rad/s
      65 +};
      66 +
      67 +export const ENEMY_DEFAULT: EnemyStats = {
      68 +  hp: 3,
      69 +  speed: 0.7,
      70 +  dps: 20,
      71 +  killPoints: 2,
      72 +  bobAmp: 0,
      73 +  bobSpeed: 0,
      74 +};
      75 +
      76 +export const ENEMY_STATS: Record<string, EnemyStats> = {
      77 +  // 🤖 Slow tank — soaks hits, hits hard on touch
      78 +  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.55, dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      79 +  // 👻 Floating, fast, fragile-ish — harder to hit because it weaves up/down
      80 +  ghost: { hp: 2, speed: 1.1,  dps: 14, killPoints: 3, bobAmp: 0.35, bobSpeed: 3.2 },
      81 +  // 💀 Glass cannon — dies to a single hit but sprints and bites hard
      82 +  skull: { hp: 1, speed: 1.45, dps: 28, killPoints: 1, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      83 +};
      84 +
      85 +export function enemyStats(type: string): EnemyStats {
      86 +  return ENEMY_STATS[type] ?? ENEMY_DEFAULT;
      87 +}
      88  export const SWORD_RADIUS = 0.6;        // meters — grip-to-enemy
      89  export const SWORD_DAMAGE = 1;

⏺ Phase 7 shipped.

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  Phase 9 options

  - Broadcast page leaderboard — mirror to the broadcast view for the big-screen/streamer audience
  - Round-over winner banner on portal — confetti + "🏆 a1b2c3 wins!" modal when all goals collected
  - Designer presets — named grid layouts, save/load/share
  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

  Which?

       927          players.delete(userId);

       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';

       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.

       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);

       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);

      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

  What's new

  - Big celebratory modal pops on portal when a round ends:
  ┌──────────────────────────┐
  │         VICTORY          │   ← green / red / amber / grey by reason
  │                          │
  │        Winner            │
  │      ● a1b2c3d4          │
  │        ⭐ 5 / 5          │
  │                          │
  │   Click anywhere to dismiss
  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

      Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition…)
  ⎿  [game-idea 561e03b] Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition

⏺ Phase 5 shipped. Game now has juice.

  What's new

  - Synthesized audio (Web Audio API — no files needed):
    - 🗡️ 🔫 pickup → quick upward chirp + haptic
    - ⭐ pickup → two-note ding
    - ❤️  powerup → warm sweep
    - Sword hit → low square thud + strong rumble
    - Enemy kill → saw buzz + big rumble
    - Gun fire → sharp click + soft rumble
    - Taking damage → saw growl + rumble
    - Round start → two-note beep
    - Round win → C–E–G victory triad
    - Round lose → descending saw dirge
    - Round timeout → single muted beep
  - Controller haptics per cue (intensity + duration tuned per action)
  - Win condition — collect all ⭐💎🎯 placed at round start → round ends with completed + victory jingle. If zero goals were
  placed, it's treated as survival mode and the clock runs normally.
  - Hurt cue throttled to every 5 HP lost so standing in fire doesn't spam.

  Test

  1. Reload VR scene
  2. Place 🗡️  🔫 ⭐ ⭐ 🤖 🔥 on portal → Start Round (30s)
  3. Grab the sword (haptic pulse + chirp)
  4. Kill the robot (thud + kill-thump, score +2)
  5. Collect both stars (ding + ding + victory fanfare since goals=0)
  6. Or walk into fire until health hits 0 → lose dirge
  7. Or let the clock run out → muted timeout beep

  Known limits

  - First sound may be silent until the user gestures (browser autoplay rule) — Start Round button on portal counts as a gesture
  for the portal, but VR scene might need one click to unlock audio. In practice Meta Quest Browser is permissive.
  - No round-result panel yet (HUD just goes idle at round end)

  Phase 6 options

  - Result panel — big "YOU WIN! 7 points" / "TIME'S UP" overlay after round end, auto-hide in 4s
  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows leaderboard
  - Enemy variants — 👻 phases through, 💀 sprints, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — drag to reposition live, bulk-clear, round presets

  Which?

      207 +  private drawResult(r: RoundResult) {
      208 +    const ctx = this.resultCtx;
      209 +    const W = RESULT_CANVAS_W, H = RESULT_CANVAS_H;
      210 +    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

      212 +    const accent = RESULT_COLORS[r.reason] ?? "#71717a";

      216 +    roundedRect(ctx, 0, 0, W, H, 40);
      217 +    ctx.fill();
      218 +

      220 +    ctx.strokeStyle = accent;
      221 +    ctx.lineWidth = 8;
      222 +    roundedRect(ctx, 6, 6, W - 12, H - 12, 34);

      224 +

      231 +

⏺ Phase 6 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big result overlay appears when the round ends, floating ~1.8m in front of the head:

  ┌─────────────────────┬─────────────┬───────┐
  │       Reason        │    Title    │ Color │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ All goals collected │ VICTORY     │ green │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Health hit 0        │ YOU DIED    │ red   │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Timer ran out       │ TIME'S UP   │ amber │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Host clicked End    │ ROUND ENDED │ grey  │
  └─────────────────────┴─────────────┴───────┘

  - Shows final ⭐ score prominently
  - Auto-dismisses after 4.5s
  - Reason-matched audio cue (already shipped in Phase 5) fires at the same time

  Test

  - Collect all ⭐ → green VICTORY + final score
  - Walk into 🔥 until dead → red YOU DIED
  - Let the clock expire → amber TIME'S UP
  - Portal hits End Round mid-play → grey ROUND ENDED

  Phase 7 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast page shows a live leaderboard during the round
  - Enemy variants — 👻 floats/phases, 💀 faster + weak, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — portal round presets (save/load grid layouts), live drag-to-move during round

      54 +// Per-variant stats. Lookup keyed by the portal's `item.type` string so
      55 +// the portal can keep emoji picking simple and the game picks up flavor.
      56 +// Unknown types fall back to ENEMY_DEFAULT (backwards-compat with any
      57 +// older grid snapshots).
      58 +export type EnemyStats = {
      59 +  hp: number;
      60 +  speed: number;         // m/s
      61 +  dps: number;           // damage-per-second to player on touch
      62 +  killPoints: number;    // score award on defeat
      63 +  bobAmp: number;        // vertical bob amplitude (m) — 0 = grounded
      64 +  bobSpeed: number;      // rad/s
      65 +};
      66 +
      67 +export const ENEMY_DEFAULT: EnemyStats = {
      68 +  hp: 3,
      69 +  speed: 0.7,
      70 +  dps: 20,
      71 +  killPoints: 2,
      72 +  bobAmp: 0,
      73 +  bobSpeed: 0,
      74 +};
      75 +
      76 +export const ENEMY_STATS: Record<string, EnemyStats> = {
      77 +  // 🤖 Slow tank — soaks hits, hits hard on touch
      78 +  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.55, dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      79 +  // 👻 Floating, fast, fragile-ish — harder to hit because it weaves up/down
      80 +  ghost: { hp: 2, speed: 1.1,  dps: 14, killPoints: 3, bobAmp: 0.35, bobSpeed: 3.2 },
      81 +  // 💀 Glass cannon — dies to a single hit but sprints and bites hard
      82 +  skull: { hp: 1, speed: 1.45, dps: 28, killPoints: 1, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      83 +};
      84 +
      85 +export function enemyStats(type: string): EnemyStats {
      86 +  return ENEMY_STATS[type] ?? ENEMY_DEFAULT;
      87 +}
      88  export const SWORD_RADIUS = 0.6;        // meters — grip-to-enemy
      89  export const SWORD_DAMAGE = 1;
      90  export const SWORD_COOLDOWN_MS = 350;

⏺ Phase 7 shipped.

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

  Which?

      60    // Server is authoritative: auto-broadcast ROUND_END when the timer fires.

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.

  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber

    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

       927          players.delete(userId);

       929
       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +

      1000        // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

⏺ Phase 9 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big celebratory modal pops on portal when a round ends:
  ┌──────────────────────────┐
  │         VICTORY          │   ← green / red / amber / grey by reason
  │                          │
  │        Winner            │
  │      ● a1b2c3d4          │
  │        ⭐ 5 / 5          │
  │                          │
  │   Click anywhere to dismiss
  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

  Test

  1. Open portal
  2. Join VR
  3. Place ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ + 🤖, start a short round
  4. Collect all goals → banner pops: "VICTORY / ● you / ⭐ 3/3"
  5. Or let time expire / die in fire → different titles + colors

  All six phases are now in game-idea branch + live at https://ar-app-jade.vercel.app/portal.html after next vercel --prod. Want
  me to deploy?

⏺ Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
      Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition…)
  ⎿  [game-idea 561e03b] Phase 5: audio + haptics + win condition

⏺ Phase 5 shipped. Game now has juice.

  What's new

  - Synthesized audio (Web Audio API — no files needed):
    - 🗡️ 🔫 pickup → quick upward chirp + haptic
    - ⭐ pickup → two-note ding
    - ❤️  powerup → warm sweep
    - Sword hit → low square thud + strong rumble
    - Enemy kill → saw buzz + big rumble
    - Gun fire → sharp click + soft rumble
    - Taking damage → saw growl + rumble
    - Round start → two-note beep
    - Round win → C–E–G victory triad
    - Round lose → descending saw dirge
    - Round timeout → single muted beep
  - Controller haptics per cue (intensity + duration tuned per action)
  - Win condition — collect all ⭐💎🎯 placed at round start → round ends with completed + victory jingle. If zero goals were
  placed, it's treated as survival mode and the clock runs normally.
  - Hurt cue throttled to every 5 HP lost so standing in fire doesn't spam.

  Test

  1. Reload VR scene
  2. Place 🗡️  🔫 ⭐ ⭐ 🤖 🔥 on portal → Start Round (30s)
  3. Grab the sword (haptic pulse + chirp)
  4. Kill the robot (thud + kill-thump, score +2)
  5. Collect both stars (ding + ding + victory fanfare since goals=0)
  6. Or walk into fire until health hits 0 → lose dirge
  7. Or let the clock run out → muted timeout beep

  Known limits

  - First sound may be silent until the user gestures (browser autoplay rule) — Start Round button on portal counts as a
  gesture for the portal, but VR scene might need one click to unlock audio. In practice Meta Quest Browser is permissive.
  - No round-result panel yet (HUD just goes idle at round end)

  Phase 6 options

  - Result panel — big "YOU WIN! 7 points" / "TIME'S UP" overlay after round end, auto-hide in 4s
  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows leaderboard
  - Enemy variants — 👻 phases through, 💀 sprints, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — drag to reposition live, bulk-clear, round presets

  Which?

✻ Sautéed for 3m 55s

       81 +  private initResultPanel() {
       82 +    this.resultCanvas = document.createElement("canvas");
       83 +    this.resultCanvas.width = RESULT_CANVAS_W;
       84 +    this.resultCanvas.height = RESULT_CANVAS_H;
       85 +    this.resultCtx = this.resultCanvas.getContext("2d")!;

       88 +    const mat = new MeshBasicMaterial({
       89 +      map: this.resultTexture,

       97 +    this.resultMesh.renderOrder = 1000;

      102 +      persistent: true,

      104 +    entity.addComponent(Follower, {

      113 +    const globals = this.world.globals as Record<string, unknown>;
      114 +    const result = GameState.roundResult(globals);
      115 +
      116 +    // Show when a result lands, hide when cleared. Signal subscription
      117 +    // fires immediately with current value — we guard the null case so
      118 +    // we don't flash an empty panel on first frame.
      119 +    this.cleanupFuncs.push(
      120 +      result.subscribe((r) => {
      121 +        if (r) {
      122 +          this.drawResult(r);
      123 +          this.resultMesh.visible = true;
      124 +        } else {
      125 +          this.resultMesh.visible = false;
      126 +        }
      127 +      }),
      128 +    );
      129 +  }
      130 +
      131    update(_delta: number, time: number) {
      132      // 10 Hz redraw — the seconds digit is the highest-frequency thing on
      133      // the panel. Anything faster wastes draw calls.

⏺ Now extend update to auto-clear the result when expired, and add drawResult:

⏺ Update(src/hud-system.ts)

      134      if (time - this.lastDraw < 0.1) return;

      138 +    // Auto-retire the result panel. HUDSystem owns the lifetime; clearing
      139 +    // the signal drops the subscription back to the hidden state.
      140 +    const result = GameState.roundResult(this.world.globals as Record<string, unknown>);
      141 +    const r = result.peek();
      142 +    if (r && Date.now() >= r.expiresAt) {
      143 +      result.value = null;
      144 +    }
      145    }

      207 +  private drawResult(r: RoundResult) {
      208 +    const ctx = this.resultCtx;
      209 +    const W = RESULT_CANVAS_W, H = RESULT_CANVAS_H;
      210 +    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      211 +
      212 +    const accent = RESULT_COLORS[r.reason] ?? "#71717a";
      213 +
      214 +    // Backdrop
      215 +    ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(12,12,16,0.88)";
      216 +    roundedRect(ctx, 0, 0, W, H, 40);
      217 +    ctx.fill();
      218 +
      219 +    // Accent border
      220 +    ctx.strokeStyle = accent;
      221 +    ctx.lineWidth = 8;
      222 +    roundedRect(ctx, 6, 6, W - 12, H - 12, 34);
      223 +    ctx.stroke();
      224 +
      225 +    // Title
      226 +    ctx.fillStyle = accent;
      227 +    ctx.font = 'bold 136px system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif';
      228 +    ctx.textAlign = "center";
      229 +    ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
      230 +    ctx.fillText(RESULT_TITLES[r.reason] ?? "ROUND OVER", W / 2, 140);
      231 +
      232 +    // Score
      233 +    ctx.fillStyle = "#fbbf24";
      234 +    ctx.font = 'bold 72px "Apple Color Emoji", system-ui, sans-serif';
      235 +    ctx.fillText("⭐", W / 2 - 110, 290);
      236 +    ctx.fillStyle = "#f4f4f5";
      237 +    ctx.font = 'bold 92px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace';
      238 +    ctx.textAlign = "left";
      239 +    ctx.fillText(String(r.score), W / 2 - 50, 293);
      240 +
      241 +    this.resultTexture.needsUpdate = true;
      242 +  }
      243  }

⏺ Phase 6 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big result overlay appears when the round ends, floating ~1.8m in front of the head:

  ┌─────────────────────┬─────────────┬───────┐
  │       Reason        │    Title    │ Color │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ All goals collected │ VICTORY     │ green │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Health hit 0        │ YOU DIED    │ red   │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Timer ran out       │ TIME'S UP   │ amber │
  ├─────────────────────┼─────────────┼───────┤
  │ Host clicked End    │ ROUND ENDED │ grey  │
  └─────────────────────┴─────────────┴───────┘

  - Shows final ⭐ score prominently
  - Auto-dismisses after 4.5s
  - Reason-matched audio cue (already shipped in Phase 5) fires at the same time

  Test

  - Collect all ⭐ → green VICTORY + final score
  - Walk into 🔥 until dead → red YOU DIED
  - Let the clock expire → amber TIME'S UP
  - Portal hits End Round mid-play → grey ROUND ENDED

  Phase 7 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast page shows a live leaderboard during the round
  - Enemy variants — 👻 floats/phases, 💀 faster + weak, 🤖 tanky
  - Designer tools — portal round presets (save/load grid layouts), live drag-to-move during round
  - Goal counter in HUD — show ⭐ 3 / 7 instead of just score so the player knows how many are left

  Which?

      53 +
      54 +// Per-variant stats. Lookup keyed by the portal's `item.type` string so
      55 +// the portal can keep emoji picking simple and the game picks up flavor.
      56 +// Unknown types fall back to ENEMY_DEFAULT (backwards-compat with any
      57 +// older grid snapshots).
      58 +export type EnemyStats = {
      59 +  hp: number;
      60 +  speed: number;         // m/s
      61 +  dps: number;           // damage-per-second to player on touch
      62 +  killPoints: number;    // score award on defeat
      63 +  bobAmp: number;        // vertical bob amplitude (m) — 0 = grounded
      64 +  bobSpeed: number;      // rad/s
      65 +};
      66 +
      67 +export const ENEMY_DEFAULT: EnemyStats = {
      68 +  hp: 3,
      69 +  speed: 0.7,
      70 +  dps: 20,
      71 +  killPoints: 2,
      72 +  bobAmp: 0,
      73 +  bobSpeed: 0,
      74 +};
      75 +
      76 +export const ENEMY_STATS: Record<string, EnemyStats> = {
      77 +  // 🤖 Slow tank — soaks hits, hits hard on touch
      78 +  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.55, dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      79 +  // 👻 Floating, fast, fragile-ish — harder to hit because it weaves up/down
      80 +  ghost: { hp: 2, speed: 1.1,  dps: 14, killPoints: 3, bobAmp: 0.35, bobSpeed: 3.2 },
      81 +  // 💀 Glass cannon — dies to a single hit but sprints and bites hard
      82 +  skull: { hp: 1, speed: 1.45, dps: 28, killPoints: 1, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      83 +};
      84 +
      85 +export function enemyStats(type: string): EnemyStats {
      86 +  return ENEMY_STATS[type] ?? ENEMY_DEFAULT;
      87 +}
      88  export const SWORD_RADIUS = 0.6;        // meters — grip-to-enemy
      89  export const SWORD_DAMAGE = 1;
      90  export const SWORD_COOLDOWN_MS = 350;

⏺ Phase 7 shipped.

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

  Which?

✻ Crunched for 4m 29s

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.

  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];

       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;

⏺ Now update SpawnedItem to be polymorphic (sprite or wall), and add a wall geometry helper:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 11 lines, removed 1 line
      126  };
      127
      128  // ── System ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
      129 +// Wall ("cube") items are rendered as real 3D geometry, not sprites,
      130 +// so players can treat them as spatial obstacles. Tall enough to block
      131 +// over-the-top shots but short enough to peek above if standing.
      132 +const WALL_WIDTH  = 0.95;   // m — leaves a narrow gap between grid cells
      133 +const WALL_HEIGHT = 2.2;
      134 +const WALL_COLOR  = 0x3b82f6; // Tailwind blue-500 — matches the 🟦 emoji
      135 +
      136  type SpawnedItem = {
      137    entity: { dispose(): void };
      131 -  sprite: Sprite;

      54 +// Per-variant stats. Lookup keyed by the portal's `item.type` string so
      55 +// the portal can keep emoji picking simple and the game picks up flavor.
      56 +// Unknown types fall back to ENEMY_DEFAULT (backwards-compat with any
      57 +// older grid snapshots).
      58 +export type EnemyStats = {
      59 +  hp: number;
      60 +  speed: number;         // m/s
      61 +  dps: number;           // damage-per-second to player on touch
      62 +  killPoints: number;    // score award on defeat
      63 +  bobAmp: number;        // vertical bob amplitude (m) — 0 = grounded
      64 +  bobSpeed: number;      // rad/s
      65 +};
      66 +
      67 +export const ENEMY_DEFAULT: EnemyStats = {
      68 +  hp: 3,
      69 +  speed: 0.7,
      70 +  dps: 20,
      71 +  killPoints: 2,
      72 +  bobAmp: 0,
      73 +  bobSpeed: 0,
      74 +};
      75 +
      76 +export const ENEMY_STATS: Record<string, EnemyStats> = {
      77 +  // 🤖 Slow tank — soaks hits, hits hard on touch
      78 +  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.55, dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      79 +  // 👻 Floating, fast, fragile-ish — harder to hit because it weaves up/down
      80 +  ghost: { hp: 2, speed: 1.1,  dps: 14, killPoints: 3, bobAmp: 0.35, bobSpeed: 3.2 },
      81 +  // 💀 Glass cannon — dies to a single hit but sprints and bites hard
      82 +  skull: { hp: 1, speed: 1.45, dps: 28, killPoints: 1, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
      83 +};
      84 +
      85 +export function enemyStats(type: string): EnemyStats {
      86 +  return ENEMY_STATS[type] ?? ENEMY_DEFAULT;

⏺ Phase 7 shipped.

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

  Which?

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  Phase 9 options

  - Broadcast page leaderboard — mirror to the broadcast view for the big-screen/streamer audience
  - Round-over winner banner on portal — confetti + "🏆 a1b2c3 wins!" modal when all goals collected
  - Designer presets — named grid layouts, save/load/share
  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

  Which?

       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },

       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);

  What's new

  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

      178 +  // Warp cooldown + exclusion — after a teleport the player keeps drifting
      179 +  // inside the destination warp's radius for a frame or two. We block
      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude
      181 +  // the destination warp until the player physically walks out of it.
      182 +  private warpCooldownUntil = 0;

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Phase 7 shipped.

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

  Which?

      59    broadcast({ type: 'ROUND_START', duration: d, endsAt: round.endsAt });

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

       927          players.delete(userId);
