       929
       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +

      1000        // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

⏺ Phase 9 shipped.

  What's new

  - Big celebratory modal pops on portal when a round ends:
  ┌──────────────────────────┐
  │         VICTORY          │   ← green / red / amber / grey by reason
  │                          │
  │        Winner            │
  │      ● a1b2c3d4          │
  │        ⭐ 5 / 5          │
  │                          │
  │   Click anywhere to dismiss
  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

  Test

  1. Open portal
  2. Join VR
  3. Place ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ + 🤖, start a short round
  4. Collect all goals → banner pops: "VICTORY / ● you / ⭐ 3/3"
  5. Or let time expire / die in fire → different titles + colors

  All six phases are now in game-idea branch + live at https://ar-app-jade.vercel.app/portal.html after next vercel --prod.

      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Shipped.

  What's new

  🌀 Warps
  - Place 2+ Warp items on the portal grid
  - In VR, walk into one → you're teleported to a random other warp
  - Big whoosh sound + strong haptic on arrival
  - Purple aura around the emoji so you can spot them
  - Breathing pulse when a round is live

  Re-trigger guards (both active simultaneously):
  1. 1.5s global cooldown — can't warp at all for 1.5s after a jump
  2. Destination lock — that specific warp won't retrigger until you physically step out of its radius. So even after the
  cooldown expires, you stay put unless you move.

  Naming
  - Palette label Portal → Warp (disambiguates from /portal.html URL)
  - Palette label Cube → Wall (since 🟦 already renders as a real 3D wall)
  - Internal data-type="warp" and new warp role

  Test

  1. Reload portal tab
  2. Place 🌀 🌀 🌀 at opposite corners + a 🟦 wall in the middle
  3. Walk into any 🌀 → whoosh, you're at a different one
  4. If you stay still on arrival → nothing happens (locked until you leave)
  5. Walk out and back in → teleport again

  Also: 🟦 cubes show in the palette as Wall now instead of Cube.

      30  // Round state. endsAt === 0 means no round in progress.
      31  // Duration is stored for reference (e.g. portals joining mid-round).
      32 -const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null };
      32 +// `snapshot` is a deep copy of gridState at ROUND_START — items the VR
      33 +// clients clear during the round are restored at ROUND_END so the
      34 +// designer's layout is authoritative across rounds.
      35 +const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null, snapshot: null };
      36
      37  function endRound(reason) {
      38    if (!round.endsAt) return;
      39    if (round.timeout) { clearTimeout(round.timeout); round.timeout = null; }
      40    round.endsAt = 0;
      41    round.duration = 0;
      42 +  // Restore the pre-round layout + push a full resync so every client
      43 +  // re-renders from the same authoritative snapshot.
      44 +  if (round.snapshot) {
      45 +    gridState.clear();
      46 +    for (const [k, v] of round.snapshot) gridState.set(k, v);
      47 +    round.snapshot = null;
      48 +  }
      49    console.log(`[⏱] Round ended (${reason})`);
      50    broadcast({ type: 'ROUND_END', reason });
      51 +  broadcast({ type: 'GRID_SYNC', grid: Object.fromEntries(gridState) });

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  Phase 9 options

  - Broadcast page leaderboard — mirror to the broadcast view for the big-screen/streamer audience
  - Round-over winner banner on portal — confetti + "🏆 a1b2c3 wins!" modal when all goals collected
  - Designer presets — named grid layouts, save/load/share
  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

  Which?

       927          players.delete(userId);

       929
       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +
       999        // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      1000        // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)

  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack

      178 +  // Warp cooldown + exclusion — after a teleport the player keeps drifting
      179 +  // inside the destination warp's radius for a frame or two. We block
      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude
      181 +  // the destination warp until the player physically walks out of it.
      182 +  private warpCooldownUntil = 0;

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Shipped.

  What's new

  🌀 Warps
  - Place 2+ Warp items on the portal grid
  - In VR, walk into one → you're teleported to a random other warp
  - Big whoosh sound + strong haptic on arrival
  - Purple aura around the emoji so you can spot them
  - Breathing pulse when a round is live

  Re-trigger guards (both active simultaneously):
  1. 1.5s global cooldown — can't warp at all for 1.5s after a jump
  2. Destination lock — that specific warp won't retrigger until you physically step out of its radius. So even after the cooldown
  expires, you stay put unless you move.

  Naming
  - Palette label Portal → Warp (disambiguates from /portal.html URL)
  - Palette label Cube → Wall (since 🟦 already renders as a real 3D wall)
  - Internal data-type="warp" and new warp role

  Test

  1. Reload portal tab
  2. Place 🌀 🌀 🌀 at opposite corners + a 🟦 wall in the middle
  3. Walk into any 🌀 → whoosh, you're at a different one
  4. If you stay still on arrival → nothing happens (locked until you leave)
  5. Walk out and back in → teleport again

  Also: 🟦 cubes show in the palette as Wall now instead of Cube.

⏺ Update(server.js)
  ⎿  Added 12 lines, removed 1 line
      29
      30  // Round state. endsAt === 0 means no round in progress.
      31  // Duration is stored for reference (e.g. portals joining mid-round).
      32 -const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null };
      32 +// `snapshot` is a deep copy of gridState at ROUND_START — items the VR
      33 +// clients clear during the round are restored at ROUND_END so the
      34 +// designer's layout is authoritative across rounds.
      35 +const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null, snapshot: null };
      36
      37  function endRound(reason) {
      38    if (!round.endsAt) return;
      39    if (round.timeout) { clearTimeout(round.timeout); round.timeout = null; }
      40    round.endsAt = 0;
      41    round.duration = 0;
      42 +  // Restore the pre-round layout + push a full resync so every client
      43 +  // re-renders from the same authoritative snapshot.
      44 +  if (round.snapshot) {
      45 +    gridState.clear();
      46 +    for (const [k, v] of round.snapshot) gridState.set(k, v);
      47 +    round.snapshot = null;
      48 +  }
      49    console.log(`[⏱] Round ended (${reason})`);
      50    broadcast({ type: 'ROUND_END', reason });
      51 +  broadcast({ type: 'GRID_SYNC', grid: Object.fromEntries(gridState) });
      52  }

      54  function startRound(duration) {

  Enemy variants

  ┌──────────┬─────┬──────────┬─────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────┐
  │          │ HP  │  Speed   │ DPS │ Kill pts │           Notes            │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

  Phase 8 options

  - Multi-user scoreboard — server tracks per-user score, broadcast view shows live leaderboard
  - Round presets / save-load — portal stores named grid layouts for quick replay
  - Round-over winner banner on portal + broadcast (not just VR HUD)
  - More items — walls/obstacles-solid (🧱) that block movement
  - Controller UI — wrist watch showing score/health instead of floating HUD

  Which?

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  Phase 9 options

  - Broadcast page leaderboard — mirror to the broadcast view for the big-screen/streamer audience
  - Round-over winner banner on portal — confetti + "🏆 a1b2c3 wins!" modal when all goals collected
  - Designer presets — named grid layouts, save/load/share
  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

  Which?

       930 +      // ── Round-end banner ───────────────────────────────────
       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },

       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {

       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);

       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';
       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';
       969 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');
       972 +          winnerRow.className = 'banner-winner';
       973 +          winnerRow.style.setProperty('--wcolor', color.solid);
       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +
       999        // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      1000        // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      1001        // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're

  What's new

  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)

  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

      178 +  // Warp cooldown + exclusion — after a teleport the player keeps drifting
      179 +  // inside the destination warp's radius for a frame or two. We block
      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude
      181 +  // the destination warp until the player physically walks out of it.
      182 +  private warpCooldownUntil = 0;

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Shipped.

  What's new

  🌀 Warps
  - Place 2+ Warp items on the portal grid
  - In VR, walk into one → you're teleported to a random other warp
  - Big whoosh sound + strong haptic on arrival
  - Purple aura around the emoji so you can spot them
  - Breathing pulse when a round is live

  Re-trigger guards (both active simultaneously):
  1. 1.5s global cooldown — can't warp at all for 1.5s after a jump
  2. Destination lock — that specific warp won't retrigger until you physically step out of its radius. So even after the cooldown
  expires, you stay put unless you move.

  Naming
  - Palette label Portal → Warp (disambiguates from /portal.html URL)
  - Palette label Cube → Wall (since 🟦 already renders as a real 3D wall)
  - Internal data-type="warp" and new warp role

  Test

  1. Reload portal tab
  2. Place 🌀 🌀 🌀 at opposite corners + a 🟦 wall in the middle
  3. Walk into any 🌀 → whoosh, you're at a different one
  4. If you stay still on arrival → nothing happens (locked until you leave)
  5. Walk out and back in → teleport again

  Also: 🟦 cubes show in the palette as Wall now instead of Cube.

       91 +  aggroRadius: number | null;   // null = always aggroed

      29
      30  // Round state. endsAt === 0 means no round in progress.

      32 -const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null };

      36
      37  function endRound(reason) {
      38    if (!round.endsAt) return;
      39    if (round.timeout) { clearTimeout(round.timeout); round.timeout = null; }
      40    round.endsAt = 0;
      41    round.duration = 0;
      42 +  // Restore the pre-round layout + push a full resync so every client
      43 +  // re-renders from the same authoritative snapshot.
      44 +  if (round.snapshot) {
      45 +    gridState.clear();
      46 +    for (const [k, v] of round.snapshot) gridState.set(k, v);
      47 +    round.snapshot = null;
      48 +  }
      49    console.log(`[⏱] Round ended (${reason})`);
      50    broadcast({ type: 'ROUND_END', reason });
      51 +  broadcast({ type: 'GRID_SYNC', grid: Object.fromEntries(gridState) });
      52  }
      53
      54  function startRound(duration) {

  │ 🤖 Robot │ 4   │ 0.55 m/s │ 20  │ 2        │ Tanky, slow — gun-friendly │
  ├──────────┼─────┼──────────┼─────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────┤
  │ 👻 Ghost │ 2   │ 1.1 m/s  │ 14  │ 3        │ Bobs vertically — tricky   │

  │ 💀 Skull │ 1   │ 1.45 m/s │ 28  │ 1        │ Glass cannon, sprinter     │
  └──────────┴─────┴──────────┴─────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────┘

  - Ghosts now weave up/down while chasing — harder to hit with the sword or a flat projectile
  - Skulls die to one hit (gun or sword) but deal serious damage if they catch you
  - Robots stay as your steady tanky chaser

  HUD

  - When a round starts with ≥1 goal: HUD shows ⭐ 2/5 progress
  - Survival rounds (no goals): HUD falls back to raw score ⭐ 8
  - Result overlay still shows the final total score

  Test

  Place 🤖 👻 💀 on portal. Start round. You'll see:
  - 🤖 lumbering at you
  - 👻 bobbing while chasing
  - 💀 sprinting — one hit from sword/gun and it's gone, but don't let it touch you

⏺ Now add playerStats, updatePlayerStats, and renderLeaderboard. Put them near updatePlayer:

⏺ Update(portal.html)
  ⎿  Added 64 lines
      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.

  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87

    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },

       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';
       958 +        if (ranked.length === 0) {
       959 +          label.textContent = '';
       960 +          const p = document.createElement('div');
       961 +          p.className = 'banner-no-winner';

       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';

       970 +
       971 +          const winnerRow = document.createElement('div');

       974 +          winnerRow.innerHTML =
       975 +            `<span class="banner-winner-dot"></span><span>${userId.slice(0, 8)}</span>`;
       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);
       977 +
       978 +          const score = document.createElement('div');
       979 +          score.className = 'banner-score';
       980 +          const progress = stats.goalsTotal > 0
       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +

  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack

      178 +  // Warp cooldown + exclusion — after a teleport the player keeps drifting
      179 +  // inside the destination warp's radius for a frame or two. We block
      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude
      181 +  // the destination warp until the player physically walks out of it.
      182 +  private warpCooldownUntil = 0;
      183 +  private lockedWarpKey: string | null = null;

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Shipped.

  What's new

  🌀 Warps
  - Place 2+ Warp items on the portal grid
  - In VR, walk into one → you're teleported to a random other warp
  - Big whoosh sound + strong haptic on arrival
  - Purple aura around the emoji so you can spot them
  - Breathing pulse when a round is live

  Re-trigger guards (both active simultaneously):
  1. 1.5s global cooldown — can't warp at all for 1.5s after a jump
  2. Destination lock — that specific warp won't retrigger until you physically step out of its radius. So even after the
  cooldown expires, you stay put unless you move.

  Naming
  - Palette label Portal → Warp (disambiguates from /portal.html URL)
  - Palette label Cube → Wall (since 🟦 already renders as a real 3D wall)
  - Internal data-type="warp" and new warp role

  Test

  1. Reload portal tab
  2. Place 🌀 🌀 🌀 at opposite corners + a 🟦 wall in the middle
  3. Walk into any 🌀 → whoosh, you're at a different one
  4. If you stay still on arrival → nothing happens (locked until you leave)
  5. Walk out and back in → teleport again

  Also: 🟦 cubes show in the palette as Wall now instead of Cube.

       78  export const ENEMY_STATS: Record<string, EnemyStats> = {
       79 -  // 🤖 Slow tank — soaks hits, hits hard on touch
       80 -  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.55, dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
       81 -  // 👻 Floating, fast, fragile-ish — harder to hit because it weaves up/down
       82 -  ghost: { hp: 2, speed: 1.1,  dps: 14, killPoints: 3, bobAmp: 0.35, bobSpeed: 3.2 },
       83 -  // 💀 Glass cannon — dies to a single hit but sprints and bites hard
       84 -  skull: { hp: 1, speed: 1.45, dps: 28, killPoints: 1, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
       79 +  // 🤖 Territorial guard — only chases when a player is within aggro
       80 +  //     range, otherwise walks home. Hits hard on touch.
       81 +  robot: { hp: 4, speed: 0.8,  dps: 20, killPoints: 2, bobAmp: 0,    bobSpeed: 0   },
       82 +  // 👻 Very slow but relentless — also the only enemy that phases
       83 +  //     through walls. Floats + weaves vertically.

       85 +  // 💀 Normal-speed stalker — locks on, occasionally switches targets.

       87  };
       88
       89 +// Per-variant AI behavior flags
       90 +export type EnemyBehavior = {
       91 +  aggroRadius: number | null;   // null = always aggroed
       92 +  wallPass: boolean;            // if false, blocked by walls
       93 +  retargetMs: number | null;    // null = never switches target
       94 +};
       95 +export const ENEMY_BEHAVIOR: Record<string, EnemyBehavior> = {
       96 +  robot: { aggroRadius: 3.0,  wallPass: false, retargetMs: null  },
       97 +  ghost: { aggroRadius: null, wallPass: true,  retargetMs: null  },
       98 +  skull: { aggroRadius: null, wallPass: false, retargetMs: 4000  },
       99 +};
      100 +export function enemyBehavior(type: string): EnemyBehavior {
      101 +  return ENEMY_BEHAVIOR[type] ?? { aggroRadius: null, wallPass: false, retargetMs: null };
      102 +}
      103 +
      104  export function enemyStats(type: string): EnemyStats {
      105    return ENEMY_STATS[type] ?? ENEMY_DEFAULT;

      37  function endRound(reason) {
      38    if (!round.endsAt) return;

      835          players.delete(userId);
      836        }
      837
      838 +      // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────
      839 +      // Keyed by userId — only VR clients that send PLAYER_POSITION
      840 +      // appear. Portal/observer connections have no stats so they're
      841 +      // silently excluded.
      842 +      const playerStats = new Map();
      843 +
      844 +      function updatePlayerStats(userId, s) {
      845 +        if (!s) return;
      846 +        // Portal's own connection never sends stats; bail if the packet
      847 +        // has no score field at all (e.g. legacy position-only messages).
      848 +        const hasStats =
      849 +          s.score != null || s.health != null || s.goalsCollected != null;
      850 +        if (!hasStats) return;
      851 +        playerStats.set(userId, {
      852 +          score: s.score ?? 0,
      853 +          health: s.health ?? 100,
      854 +          goalsCollected: s.goalsCollected ?? 0,
      855 +          goalsTotal: s.goalsTotal ?? 0,
      856 +        });
      857 +        renderLeaderboard();
      858 +      }
      859 +
      860 +      function renderLeaderboard() {
      861 +        const entriesEl = document.getElementById('lb-entries');
      862 +        const countEl   = document.getElementById('lb-count');
      863 +        const rows = [...playerStats.entries()];
      864 +
      865 +        // Rank by goals collected first (primary objective), then raw score,
      866 +        // then health as a tiebreaker. Fits the game's scoring intent.
      867 +        rows.sort((a, b) => {
      868 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
      869 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
      870 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
      871 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
      872 +        });
      873 +
      874 +        countEl.textContent = rows.length;
      875 +
      876 +        if (rows.length === 0) {
      877 +          entriesEl.innerHTML = '<div class="lb-empty">Waiting for VR players…</div>';
      878 +          return;
      879 +        }
      880 +
      881 +        entriesEl.innerHTML = rows.map(([userId, s], i) => {
      882 +          const color = colorForUser(userId);
      883 +          const short = userId.slice(0, 6);
      884 +          const label = userId === myUserId ? `${short} (you)` : short;
      885 +          const progress = s.goalsTotal > 0
      886 +            ? `${s.goalsCollected}/${s.goalsTotal}`
      887 +            : String(s.score);
      888 +          const hpClass =
      889 +            s.health <= 25 ? ' critical' :
      890 +            s.health <= 50 ? ' warning' : '';
      891 +          return (
      892 +            `<div class="lb-row lb-rank-${i + 1}">` +
      893 +              `<span class="lb-dot" style="--pcolor: ${color.solid}"></span>` +
      894 +              `<span class="lb-name">${label}</span>` +
      895 +              `<span class="lb-score">⭐ ${progress}</span>` +
      896 +              `<span class="lb-health${hpClass}">${Math.ceil(s.health)}</span>` +
      897 +            `</div>`
      898 +          );
      899 +        }).join('');
      900 +      }
      901 +
      902        function updatePlayer(userId, pos) {
      903          if (!pos) return;
      904          const entry = ensurePlayer(userId);

⏺ Phase 8 shipped.

  What's new

  - VR stats streamed — score, health, goals-collected, goals-total all ride on the existing 10 Hz position packet. No new
  message type.
  - Server wipes cached scores on ROUND_START so the leaderboard starts clean.
  - Floating leaderboard on the portal (top-right):
  PLAYERS                              2
  ● a1b2c3 (you)        ⭐ 3/5       87
  ● d4e5f6              ⭐ 1/5       45 ←amber
    - Color dot matches the user's VR avatar color
    - Rank 1 highlighted in gold
    - Health turns amber at ≤50, red at ≤25
    - Shows goalsCollected/goalsTotal when round has goals, otherwise raw score
    - Sorted by goals → score → health
    - Updates live at 10 Hz
  - Empty state when no VR players are connected.

  Test

  - One person in VR, one watching portal → portal shows the VR player's live score
  - Two VR headsets on the same WS → both appear, ranked

  Phase 9 options

  - Broadcast page leaderboard — mirror to the broadcast view for the big-screen/streamer audience
  - Round-over winner banner on portal — confetti + "🏆 a1b2c3 wins!" modal when all goals collected
  - Designer presets — named grid layouts, save/load/share
  - Spectator-friendly scene hints — minimap / item counts / "5 🤖 left" badge
  - Match series — best-of-3 rounds with aggregate score

  Which?

       931 +      const BANNER_META = {
       932 +        completed:    { title: 'VICTORY',       color: '#10b981' },
       933 +        died:         { title: 'CONTESTANT DOWN', color: '#ef4444' },
       934 +        timeout:      { title: "TIME'S UP",     color: '#f59e0b' },
       935 +        'host-stopped': { title: 'ROUND ENDED', color: '#a1a1aa' },
       936 +      };
       937 +      const BANNER_DURATION_MS = 5500;
       938 +      let bannerHideTimer = null;
       939 +
       940 +      function showBanner(reason) {
       941 +        const meta = BANNER_META[reason] ?? BANNER_META['host-stopped'];
       942 +        const banner = document.getElementById('banner');
       943 +        banner.style.setProperty('--banner-accent', meta.color);
       944 +        document.getElementById('banner-reason').textContent = meta.title;
       945 +
       946 +        // Snapshot the leaderboard at this moment — damageEnemy +
       947 +        // pickups have all settled before ROUND_END fires.
       948 +        const ranked = [...playerStats.entries()].sort((a, b) => {
       949 +          const ga = a[1].goalsCollected, gb = b[1].goalsCollected;
       950 +          if (ga !== gb) return gb - ga;
       951 +          if (a[1].score !== b[1].score) return b[1].score - a[1].score;
       952 +          return b[1].health - a[1].health;
       953 +        });
       954 +
       955 +        const host = document.getElementById('banner-winner-host');
       956 +        const label = document.getElementById('banner-winner-label');
       957 +        host.innerHTML = '';

       959 +          label.textContent = '';

       962 +          p.textContent = 'No contestants this round';
       963 +          host.appendChild(p);
       964 +        } else {
       965 +          // Host shows the top player + their score. Draws/ties just
       966 +          // show whoever sorted first — good enough for a prototype.
       967 +          const [userId, stats] = ranked[0];
       968 +          label.textContent = reason === 'died' ? 'Final Standing' : 'Winner';

       976 +          host.appendChild(winnerRow);

       981 +            ? `${stats.goalsCollected} / ${stats.goalsTotal}`
       982 +            : String(stats.score);
       983 +          score.textContent = `⭐ ${progress}`;
       984 +          host.appendChild(score);
       985 +        }
       986 +
       987 +        banner.classList.add('show');
       988 +        if (bannerHideTimer) clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer);
       989 +        bannerHideTimer = setTimeout(hideBanner, BANNER_DURATION_MS);
       990 +      }
       991 +
       992 +      function hideBanner() {
       993 +        document.getElementById('banner').classList.remove('show');
       994 +        if (bannerHideTimer) { clearTimeout(bannerHideTimer); bannerHideTimer = null; }
       995 +      }
       996 +
       997 +      document.getElementById('banner').addEventListener('click', hideBanner);
       998 +
       999        // ── Leaderboard state ──────────────────────────────────

  What's new

  - Big celebratory modal pops on portal when a round ends:
  ┌──────────────────────────┐
  │         VICTORY          │   ← green / red / amber / grey by reason
  │                          │
  │        Winner            │
  │      ● a1b2c3d4          │
  │        ⭐ 5 / 5          │
  │                          │
  │   Click anywhere to dismiss
  └──────────────────────────┘
  - Reasons match the VR HUD overlay:
    - completed → VICTORY (green)
    - died → CONTESTANT DOWN (red)
    - timeout → TIME'S UP (amber)
    - host-stopped → ROUND ENDED (grey)
  - Winner snapshot frozen at banner-open time so late packets can't reshuffle the display
  - Auto-dismiss at 5.5s, or click to close
  - Next ROUND_START hides it so back-to-backs don't stack
  - Empty-state shows "No contestants this round" if nobody was in VR

      178 +  // Warp cooldown + exclusion — after a teleport the player keeps drifting
      179 +  // inside the destination warp's radius for a frame or two. We block
      180 +  // re-triggers globally for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS, and additionally exclude
      181 +  // the destination warp until the player physically walks out of it.
      182 +  private warpCooldownUntil = 0;

⏺ Add a dedicated tickWarps method after tickEnemyAI:

⏺ Update(src/portal.ts)
  ⎿  Added 65 lines
      710      }
      711    }
      712
      713 +  // Warp teleport — active any time, not gated on roundRunning. Walking
      714 +  // into a 🌀 sends the player to a random *other* warp on the grid.
      715 +  //
      716 +  // The re-trigger problem (player lands inside another warp and would
      717 +  // chain instantly) is solved two ways, together:
      718 +  //   1) Global cooldown blocks any warp for WARP_COOLDOWN_MS.
      719 +  //   2) The destination warp is *locked* until the player physically
      720 +  //      leaves its radius — so even after cooldown, you won't bounce
      721 +  //      back unless you move.
      722 +  private tickWarps() {
      723 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(this.tempPos);
      724 +    const r2 = WARP_RADIUS * WARP_RADIUS;
      725 +    const now = performance.now();
      726 +
      727 +    // Collect all warps once — we need both "am I inside one?" and
      728 +    // "give me a random destination" lookups.
      729 +    const warps: { key: string; pos: Vector3 }[] = [];
      730 +    for (const [key, item] of this.spawnedEntities) {
      731 +      if (item.role === 'warp') warps.push({ key, pos: item.object3D.position });
      732 +    }
      733 +
      734 +    // Clear the locked warp once the player has stepped out of its radius.
      735 +    if (this.lockedWarpKey) {
      736 +      const locked = this.spawnedEntities.get(this.lockedWarpKey);
      737 +      if (!locked || locked.role !== 'warp') {
      738 +        this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      739 +      } else {
      740 +        const d2 = this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(locked.object3D.position);
      741 +        if (d2 > r2) this.lockedWarpKey = null;
      742 +      }
      743 +    }
      744 +
      745 +    if (now < this.warpCooldownUntil) return;
      746 +    if (warps.length < 2) return; // need at least two to make a trip
      747 +
      748 +    // Find the warp the player is currently inside (that isn't locked)
      749 +    let entered: { key: string; pos: Vector3 } | null = null;
      750 +    for (const w of warps) {
      751 +      if (w.key === this.lockedWarpKey) continue;
      752 +      if (this.tempPos.distanceToSquared(w.pos) < r2) { entered = w; break; }
      753 +    }
      754 +    if (!entered) return;
      755 +
      756 +    // Pick a random destination that isn't the one we're inside.
      757 +    const candidates = warps.filter((w) => w.key !== entered!.key);
      758 +    const dest = candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
      759 +
      760 +    // Teleport by moving the XROrigin such that the player's head lands
      761 +    // at the destination. We don't touch Y so the player stays at the
      762 +    // floor level the locomotion system maintained.
      763 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;             // already set above
      764 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;         // reuse scratch
      765 +    this.player.getWorldPosition(originWorld);
      766 +    const dx = dest.pos.x - (headWorld.x - originWorld.x);
      767 +    const dz = dest.pos.z - (headWorld.z - originWorld.z);
      768 +    this.player.position.x = dx;
      769 +    this.player.position.z = dz;
      770 +
      771 +    this.warpCooldownUntil = now + WARP_COOLDOWN_MS;
      772 +    this.lockedWarpKey = dest.key;
      773 +    // Either hand works — prefer right if both are connected.
      774 +    FX.warp(this.input.gamepads.right ?? this.input.gamepads.left);
      775 +    console.log(`[Warp] ${entered.key} → ${dest.key}`);
      776 +  }
      777 +
      778    private applyPickup(role: ItemRole) {
      779      const leftPad  = this.input.gamepads.left;
      780      const rightPad = this.input.gamepads.right;

⏺ Shipped.

  What's new

  🌀 Warps
  - Place 2+ Warp items on the portal grid
  - In VR, walk into one → you're teleported to a random other warp
  - Big whoosh sound + strong haptic on arrival
  - Purple aura around the emoji so you can spot them
  - Breathing pulse when a round is live

  Re-trigger guards (both active simultaneously):
  1. 1.5s global cooldown — can't warp at all for 1.5s after a jump
  2. Destination lock — that specific warp won't retrigger until you physically step out of its radius. So even after the
  cooldown expires, you stay put unless you move.

  Naming
  - Palette label Portal → Warp (disambiguates from /portal.html URL)
  - Palette label Cube → Wall (since 🟦 already renders as a real 3D wall)
  - Internal data-type="warp" and new warp role

  Test

  1. Reload portal tab
  2. Place 🌀 🌀 🌀 at opposite corners + a 🟦 wall in the middle
  3. Walk into any 🌀 → whoosh, you're at a different one
  4. If you stay still on arrival → nothing happens (locked until you leave)
  5. Walk out and back in → teleport again

  Also: 🟦 cubes show in the palette as Wall now instead of Cube.

      30  // Round state. endsAt === 0 means no round in progress.

      32 -const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null };

      33 +// clients clear during the round are restored at ROUND_END so the
      34 +// designer's layout is authoritative across rounds.
      35 +const round = { endsAt: 0, duration: 0, timeout: null, snapshot: null };
      36
      37  function endRound(reason) {
      38    if (!round.endsAt) return;
      39    if (round.timeout) { clearTimeout(round.timeout); round.timeout = null; }
      40    round.endsAt = 0;
      41    round.duration = 0;
      42 +  // Restore the pre-round layout + push a full resync so every client
      43 +  // re-renders from the same authoritative snapshot.
      44 +  if (round.snapshot) {
      45 +    gridState.clear();
      46 +    for (const [k, v] of round.snapshot) gridState.set(k, v);
      47 +    round.snapshot = null;
      48 +  }
      49    console.log(`[⏱] Round ended (${reason})`);
      50    broadcast({ type: 'ROUND_END', reason });
      51 +  broadcast({ type: 'GRID_SYNC', grid: Object.fromEntries(gridState) });
      52  }

      740 +  private teleportPlayerTo(targetX: number, targetZ: number) {
      741 +    const headWorld = this.tempPos;
      742 +    this.player.head.getWorldPosition(headWorld);
      743 +    const originWorld = this.tempChase;

      749 +  // Pick a deterministic spawn: hash userId into the spawn list so two
      750 +  // players reliably end up at different chairs when there are enough.
      751 +  // Falls back to origin when no spawns are placed.
      752 +  private teleportToSpawn() {
      753 +    const spawns: { x: number; z: number }[] = [];
      754 +    for (const item of this.spawnedEntities.values()) {
      755 +      if (item.role === 'spawn') {
      756 +        spawns.push({ x: item.origin[0], z: item.origin[2] });
      757 +      }
      758      }
      759 +    if (spawns.length === 0) {
      760 +      this.teleportPlayerTo(0, 0);
      761 +      return;
      762 +    }
      763 +    // Hash userId to a stable index. Portal observers have no userId
      764 +    // here — fallback to random for offline/dev.
      765 +    let h = 0;
      766 +    const id = this.userId ?? String(Math.random());
      767 +    for (let i = 0; i < id.length; i++) h = (h * 31 + id.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
      768 +    const pick = spawns[Math.abs(h) % spawns.length];
      769 +    this.teleportPlayerTo(pick.x, pick.z);
      770    }
